data.title: First American named to Fortune Best Workplaces for Women™ for 10 years consecutively. Celebrating women in the workplace.
data.description: In Santa Ana, California, First American Financial Corporation (NYSE: FAF) was chosen by Great Place To Work® and Fortune magazine as one of the 2025 Fortune Best Workplaces for Women™. This marks the company's tenth consecutive year on this prestigious list. First American is a leading provider of title, settlement, and risk solutions for real estate transactions, at the forefront of digitizing its industry. The recognition highlights the company's commitment to providing a positive work environment for women.

data.title: Truck driver invents safety system after 25 years of experience to prevent accidents - PRNewswire, Oct 23, 2025.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on October 23, 2025, an inventor from Langhorne, Pennsylvania, with 25 years of truck driving experience expressed concern over doors being left open, leading to hazards, damages, and injuries. This prompted the creation of THE SAFE TRUCK PROJECT, aimed at addressing and preventing such incidents.

data.title: Raymond F. Kerins, Jr., CEO of NSG, joins AFPC-USA Advisory Board in New York, announced 23rd Oct 2025.
data.description: Raymond F. Kerins, Jr., CEO of The Next Solutions Group, has recently been named to the Advisory Board of the Association of Foreign Press Correspondents in the United States. This new appointment highlights Kerins' extensive experience and expertise in the industry. The AFPC-USA made the announcement on Oct. 23, 2025, signaling its recognition of Kerins' leadership. This move is set to further enhance the board's composition with Kerins' strategic insights. With this development, Kerins joins a select group guiding the AFPC-USA, emphasizing the organization's commitment to fostering connections and collaboration within the foreign press industry.

data.title: Attain Partners hosted summit in New York on Oct 22 to strengthen future of nonprofit sector with top Chief Development Officers.
data.description: In New York on October 22, 2025, Attain Partners spearheaded a significant summit titled "Enhancing the Foundation: Current Needs of Nonprofits for the Future of Society." The event assembled numerous top Chief Development Officers from the nonprofit sector.
HEINEKEN CEO: US TARIFFS ARE HURTING OUR US PROFITABILITY; CANNOT RAISE PRICES VS LOCAL COMPETITORS
European Union has imposed sanctions on the head of Moscow University because of a disputed course.

Heineken CEO Says Production Changes to Beat US Tariffs Will Take Time, US Tariffs Hurt Profitability and Limit Price Hikes, Might Close Some European Breweries and Invest in Others, Will Not Sell Brands but May Let Some Fade Out .

data.title: Hardin's Creek unveils Warehouse Series: 3-part exploration of flavor. New bourbon release offers unique flavor nuances.
data.description: Hardin's Creek Kentucky Straight Bourbon Whiskey, known for its exquisite flavors, is now welcoming whisky enthusiasts to explore its unique offerings. Situated in Clermont, Kentucky, the latest release from Hardin's Creek provides a taste experience like no other. Launched on October 23, 2025, this ultra-premium experimental American Whiskey takes connoisseurs on a journey of discovery with each sip. Appreciators of fine spirits are invited to delve into the rich depths of Hardin's Creek, where a world of flavor awaits them.

data.title: Sydney Silverman partners with Dillard's to launch Gianni Bini x Sydney Silverman collaboration, a modern western dream for fall-to-winter. 🤠 #FashionNews
data.description: Get ready for the fashion collaboration everyone has been waiting for this season! Dillard's, Inc. and fashion icon Sydney Silverman have launched Gianni Bini x Syndey Silverman, the must-have collection for the fall-to-winter wardrobe. This modern Western-inspired line is set to dazzle with its unique designs and innovative style. The collaboration was officially announced in Los Angeles on October 23, 2025. Fashion enthusiasts can't wait to get their hands on this collection, expected to be a huge hit this season across the country.

data.title: PeachSkinSheets launches "Peach Perfect Patterns" collection with 14 designs, catering to customer comfort and style.
data.description: Atlanta-based company PeachSkinSheets has recently launched a new collection called Peach Perfect Patterns on October 23, 2025. This lineup consists of 14 unique designs that cater to various tastes, offering a range from contemporary to vintage styles. The collection aims to add artistry, warmth, and personality to bedrooms. This release is timed to coincide with the holiday season, allowing customers to spruce up their living spaces. With the ability to mix and match designs, customers can create a customized look for their bedrooms.

data.title: Lightning introduces new tools for PyTorch developers, focusing on distributed training, reinforcement learning. Lightning aims to provide a better platform for PyTorch devs.
data.description: In New York, the creators of PyTorch Lightning have unveiled a set of new tools designed to enhance distributed training, reinforcement learning, and experimentation for PyTorch developers and researchers. This announcement coincides with the PyTorch Conference 2025, underlining Lightning's dedication to providing top-notch support for the PyTorch community. The newly introduced suite features an AI Code Editor tailored specifically for PyTorch developers, aiming to streamline workflows and boost efficiency in the field.

data.title: AZ Blue introduces new 2026 Prosano Health® Plans for ACA, offering Arizonans coverage and care in one.
data.description: In October 23, 2025, Arizonans were presented with the opportunity to access healthcare through the new 2026 Prosano Health® Plans under the ACA. Blue Cross Blue Shield of Arizona (AZ Blue) introduced these plans as a comprehensive option for individuals and families in need of health coverage. This initiative offers a seamless combination of coverage and care, catering to the needs of more residents in the region.

data.title: Home equity rates drop; 46.1% of homes equity-rich, while seriously underwater homes rise in 46 states.
data.description: A recent report by ATTOM revealed that 46.1% of homes across the country are classified as equity-rich. Additionally, the proportion of seriously underwater homes has increased compared to the previous year in 46 states. The report, covering the third quarter of 2025, highlights these trends in the U.S. real estate market.

data.title: Movie "Aftershock: The Nicole P Bell Story" about Sean Bell's murder narrated by fiancé Nicole P Bell to release worldwide Nov 28.
data.description: Faith Media Distribution has announced that the movie "Aftershock: The Nicole P Bell Story" will be hitting theaters worldwide on November 28, 2025. The film tells the story of the tragic events following the wrongful shooting of Sean Bell. This release will be happening in major cities like New York and Los Angeles.

data.title: Meet Buzz, AI intern by Hive, saves 8 hrs/week, cutting inbox time by 37%, launched on Oct. 23, 2025.
data.description: New AI tool Buzz, introduced by Hive in New York on Oct. 23, 2025, is designed to automate users' tasks, saving them 8 hours each week. As a tireless intern available round-the-clock, Buzz helps reduce inbox time by 37%. In the beta phase, users were able to reclaim an average of 8 hours weekly by utilizing Buzz for various work-related functions.

data.title: WEC Energy Group (NYSE: WEC) will announce its 2025 third-quarter results on Oct. 30 with a conference call at 1 p.m.
data.description: On October 23, 2025, WEC Energy Group Inc. (NYSE: WEC) announced that it will be releasing its third-quarter earnings report for 2025 before the market opens on October 30. Additionally, a conference call will be held on the same day at 1 p.m. Central time for investors and security analysts to discuss the financial results.

data.title: MOVA reveals advanced robotic pool cleaner, Rover X10, with underwater drone-like agility at Las Vegas launch.
data.description: In Las Vegas on October 23, 2025, MOVA, a leading smart home company, introduced their latest product, the Rover X10 robotic pool cleaner. This innovative device utilizes vertical thrust technology to perform various underwater movements such as rising, hovering, descending, and moving laterally. The X10 is designed to efficiently clean pools and enhance maintenance processes.

data.title: Price.com partners with Erewhon to offer AI-powered shopping for members, giving one year of free Price.com Pro with 50% more cash back.
data.description: Price.com, an innovative savings platform powered by AI, has recently partnered with Erewhon's Lifestyle Collective, which features top collaborators like Prenuvo, Bon Charge, Pvolve, Seed Health, and Alo Yoga. This strategic alliance aims to offer a specialized array of wellness, fitness, diagnostics, and lifestyle benefits to enhance daily experiences. Under this partnership, Erewhon members can access Price.com Pro for a year at no cost, gaining perks that include a significant increase of 50% in cash back rewards.

data.title: Odys Aviation names Oliver Reinhardt as Head of Design Organization, brings 30 years of experience.
data.description: In Long Beach, California, Odys Aviation has appointed Oliver Reinhardt as the new Head of Design Organization. With over 30 years of experience in aviation and automotive sectors, Reinhardt specializes in aircraft certification, safety, and innovative design. Previously serving as the Chief Risk and Certification Officer at Vo, he brings a wealth of knowledge to Odys Aviation's team of professionals. The company focuses on developing hybrid-electric vertical take-off and landing (VTOL) aircraft, aiming to revolutionize the aerospace industry.

data.title: Ludwig Institute study: 'Off-the-books' work ineffective for most low-income workers, only 670,000 Americans benefit.
data.description: A recent study revealed that "off-the-books" income is not significantly benefiting the finances of low-income workers. The research, conducted in Washington, reported that approximately 670,000 Americans engage in informal work daily. Contrary to popular belief, this clandestine economy is not as effective in alleviating financial struggles for those with lower incomes.
